message:
feat(ad,conformance): stabilize eigh VJP for clustered eigenvalues, expand edge-case AD tests

Replace hard-coded 1e-20 eigenvalue gap threshold with a relative
tolerance helper (safe_eigen_gap_reciprocal) that scales with eigenvalue
magnitude, and use the skew-symmetric component of V^T g_V instead of
the full matrix D — only the tangent-space projection contributes to
the gradient on the orthogonal group.

Add eigh_vjp_close_eigenvalues_is_bounded test confirming the guard
keeps gradients finite and bounded for nearly-degenerate spectra.

Remaining changes are rustfmt formatting fixes and removal of unused
imports in dtype_promotion_oracle_parity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
